mapper.select:
SELECT c.id as id, c.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, c.customer_type as customerType, c.channel_addr as channelAddr, COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_code) as authCount, c.status as status, c.updated_time as updatedTime, c.updater_name as updaterName FROM customer_channel c left join site_customer s on c.channel_code = s.channel_code WHERE 1 = 1
and c.channel_code like concat ('%', #{requestVO.channelCode},'%')
and c.channel_name like concat ('%', #{requestVO.channelName},'%')
and c.status = #{requestVO.status}
GROUP BY c.channel_code ORDER BY c.created_time desc
